revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no ja/en source); add local discussion section + dated import note

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Talk:Anamigo Toshunushi Ōube Hyoju Shrine]] to [[Talk:Anamigo Toshunushi Ōube Hyōzu Shrine]]: Text replacement - "Hyoju" to "Hyōzu"
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:shinto>Unknown user]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Anamigo_Toshunushi_%C5%8Cube_Hy%C5%8Dzu_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
